zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary verch Gruffydd於大約1200年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾時，她的父親Gruffydd ap Cydrych Lord of Gwinfe27歲，母親Miss verch Hywel22歲。她和Rhys " Goch"至少有10個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary verch Gruffydd于大约1200年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾时，她的父亲Gruffydd ap Cydrych Lord of Gwinfe27岁，母亲Miss verch Hywel22岁。她和Rhys " Goch"至少有10个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Mary verch Gruffydd was born about 1200, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Gruffydd ap Cydrych Lord of Gwinfe, was 27 and her mother, Miss verch Hywel, was 22. She had at least 10 sons with Rhys " Goch".

fr.Cadoxton, Glamorganshire, Wales: Cadoxton, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary verch Gruffydd est née environ 1200, à Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffydd ap Cydrych Lord of Gwinfe, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Miss verch Hywel, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 10 fils avec Rhys " Goch".

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary verch Gruffydd um 1200 in Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gruffydd ap Cydrych Lord of Gwinfe 27 und ihre Mutter Miss verch Hywel 22. Sie hatte mit Rhys " Goch" mindestens 10 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary verch Gruffydd è nata il circa 1200 nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gruffydd ap Cydrych Lord of Gwinfe, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Miss verch Hywel, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 10 figli con Rhys " Goch".

ja.lifeSummary: Mary verch Gruffyddが約1200年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gruffydd ap Cydrych Lord of Gwinfeは27歳，母Miss verch Hywelは22歳であった。彼女はRhys " Goch"との間に少なくとも10人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary verch Gruffydd(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gruffydd ap Cydrych Lord of Gwinfe(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Miss verch Hywel(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Rhys " Goch"(와)과 적어도 열 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary verch Gruffydd nasceu aproximadamente 1200, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffydd ap Cydrych Lord of Gwinfe, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Miss verch Hywel, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 10 filhos com Rhys " Goch".

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary verch Gruffydd родилась около 1200 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gruffydd ap Cydrych Lord of Gwinfe было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Miss verch Hywel, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 10 сыновей от Rhys " Goch".

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary verch Gruffydd nació aproximadamente 1200, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffydd ap Cydrych Lord of Gwinfe, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Miss verch Hywel, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 10 hijos con Rhys " Goch".
